languages.text: "Да, пожалуй. Чудовищ порождают надежда и страх. Я был движим обоими".
"Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."
languages.original_text: "Да, пожалуй. Чудовищ порождают надежда и страх. Я был движим обоими".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."
"Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."
"Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

languages.text: «Sí que lo es. Los monstruos nacen de la esperanza y el miedo. Mis dos principales motivaciones».
languages.original_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

traits.locale_text: «Sí que lo es. Los monstruos nacen de la esperanza y el miedo. Mis dos principales motivaciones».

languages.text: “对，没错。怪物是希望与恐惧的产物。而我正被这两者驱使着。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

traits.locale_text: “对，没错。怪物是希望与恐惧的产物。而我正被这两者驱使着。”

languages.text: « Vous avez raison. Les monstres sont engendrés par l'espoir et la peur. Les deux sont à l'origine de mes actes. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison. Les monstres sont engendrés par l'espoir et la peur. Les deux sont à l'origine de mes actes. »

languages.text: "Evet, öyle. Canavarlar, umut ve korkudan doğar. Ben her iki hisse de kapıldım."
languages.original_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

traits.locale_text: "Evet, öyle. Canavarlar, umut ve korkudan doğar. Ben her iki hisse de kapıldım."

languages.text: "Ja, ist es. Monster werden aus Hoffnung und Furcht geboren. Ich wurde von beiden getrieben."
languages.original_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ist es. Monster werden aus Hoffnung und Furcht geboren. Ich wurde von beiden getrieben."

languages.text: 「ええ、その通りです。怪物は希望と恐怖から生まれる。私は、その両方に突き動かされていました」
languages.original_text: "Yes, it is. Monsters are born of hope and fear. I was driven by both."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、その通りです。怪物は希望と恐怖から生まれる。私は、その両方に突き動かされていました」
